candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over identical subtotal 'Total Revenue'.
Also matches top-line revenue, but appears to be a duplicate subtotal of 'Revenue'.
Operating expense, not revenue.

variables.notes: Use 'Revenue' first; 'Total Revenue' is a valid fallback if the primary label changes across years.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; sits near the top of the income statement and behaves like cost of sales.
Explicit balancing row, not an operating cost line.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost bucket; excluded balancing row.

candidates.why: Although listed as a candidate, it sits under 'Materials and services' and is therefore part of COGS rather than SG&A.
Also appears within 'Materials and services', so more consistent with COGS than SG&A.
Core overhead/personnel cost and strong SG&A component.

candidates.row_label: Share-based incentive schemes implemented as shares
candidates.why: Share-based compensation is an SG&A-type overhead component.
Best broad overhead bucket; for 2023-2021 it appears to capture items such as sales and marketing/other operating overhead, and it is the only populated overhead bucket in later years.
Semantically SG&A, but preview shows no values and 'Employee benefit expenses' is the clearer populated personnel expense line.
Clear SG&A component, but it appears to roll into 'Other operating expenses' where both are present, so including both risks double counting.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not SG&A expense.

candidates.row_label: Wages & salaries and social security payments
candidates.why: Balance sheet accrued liability, not income statement SG&A expense.
Operational metric, not expense.

final_choice.row_label: Share-based incentive schemes implemented as shares

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row is present. Selected the main overhead buckets while excluding 'Sales and marketing expenses' because it appears embedded in 'Other operating expenses' in years where both are shown, which would risk double counting. Excluded external services rows because they are nested under 'Materials and services' and align with COGS.

candidates.why: Development-related line, but it is amortization within D&A rather than a dedicated R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.
Balancing row, not expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated research and development expense line is visible. 'Amortization of Capitalised development costs' is amortization and should not be used as current-period R&D expense.

candidates.why: Interest expense line, likely older/alternate label for lease-related interest.
Broader finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if a dedicated interest line is unavailable.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses from financial liabilities carried at amortised cost
candidates.why: Most direct non-lease interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Dedicated lease-interest expense line; useful alternate label across years.
Too broad and not specifically interest.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest, lower priority than the main line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses from financial liabilities carried at amortised cost
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Ordered as a priority list: dedicated interest expense lines first, broader 'Financial expenses' as fallback.

candidates.why: Equity component only, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company
candidates.why: Best match because it captures parent/common equity and excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred when owner equity is available.
Balancing row, not an equity measure to use directly.
Balancing row, not an equity measure to use directly.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income allocation line, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Also appears as income allocation in the income statement, not book minority equity.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive income attributable to noncontrolling interests
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation, not balance-sheet minority equity.
Direct balance-sheet minority interest line.
Equivalent balance-sheet label and good fallback.
